title: adenostemma suffruticosum
intro: Adenostemma suffruticosum, also known as Bidens suffruticosa or bidens, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, Adenostemma suffruticosum is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
